task_completion.description: Create a 2x2 matrix with X-axis labeled 'Interest' and Y-axis labeled 'Power'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2x2 grid or matrix diagram is visible on the canvas with 'Interest' on the horizontal axis and 'Power' on the vertical axis.

task_completion.description: Label the four quadrants correctly: 'Manage Closely', 'Keep Satisfied', 'Keep Informed', and 'Monitor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text labels 'Manage Closely' (Top-Right), 'Keep Satisfied' (Top-Left), 'Keep Informed' (Bottom-Right), and 'Monitor' (Bottom-Left) are placed in their respective quadrants.

task_completion.description: Plot 'Chief Medical Officer' and 'Hospital Board' in the Top-Right quadrant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Chief Medical Officer' and 'Hospital Board' are located in the 'Manage Closely' (Top-Right) quadrant.

task_completion.description: Plot 'Finance Director', 'Nursing Staff', and 'IT Maintenance Team' in their correct quadrants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Finance Director' is in the Top-Left, 'Nursing Staff' is in the Bottom-Right, and 'IT Maintenance Team' is in the Bottom-Left quadrant.

task_completion.description: Add the title 'EHR Project Stakeholder Map' to the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'EHR Project Stakeholder Map' is visible at the top or prominently on the diagram.

task_completion.description: Save the project as stakeholder_map.eddx and export as stakeholder_map.png in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or save/export dialogs showing stakeholder_map.eddx and stakeholder_map.png in the ~/Documents directory, or the EdrawMax window title showing stakeholder_map.eddx.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the matrix.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the EdrawMax application interface being actively used to draw the matrix and add text, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's save/export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog boxes from EdrawMax are visible, rather than using terminal commands to rename or move files.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write the required text into a basic text editor or terminal to bypass the diagram creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is placed within a graphical diagram in EdrawMax, not in a plain text file or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output paths are /home/ga/Documents/stakeholder_map.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/stakeholder_map.png. The diagram must contain the following exact text labels: 'Interest', 'Power', 'Manage Closely', 'Keep Satisfied', 'Keep Informed', 'Monitor', 'Chief Medical Officer', 'Finance Director', 'Nursing Staff', 'IT Maintenance Team', and 'Hospital Board'.
